parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-764 (RP25 Migration Platform interface implementation, Risk B, 40 units, RP25.P03.M02.S15-RP25.P03.M04.S12) via Read/Grep/Glob only. The pack's descriptor-verification claim (production_ready_flag "migration_platform_interface_implementation_descriptor_verified") is supported. (1) Baseline reconciles: registry CP00-764 binding matches risk/units/range/next-pack; the 40 included_units reproduce the stated deliverable distribution (claude_review:2, implementation:19, contract:9, security_audit:4, test:5, hermes_evidence:1) and micro-title distribution; INTERFACE_ROWS slices in CP764 requirements map 1:1 to M02(6)/M03(22)/M04(12). (2) Implementation is sound: service.js builds MigrationPlatformCp764InterfaceImplementationDescriptor with authority_boundary claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-765; validators.js:762 enforces descriptor type, section/row coverage, descriptor-only + no raw/source/credential/client-data payloads, no source-system or import runtime opened, permission/audit no-leak, Hermes/Claude gate, and handoff drift. import-plan.js and mappers.js remain dry-run, credential-free, no-write. No real I/O, network, credential, or product-state write exists in product source (matches are only false-valued boundary flags and guard checks). (3) Tests/validation: model.test.js adds CP00-764 binding/coverage, runtime-closed, and latest-projection assertions; command-evidence.json records all ten required commands at exit_code 0, migration model test 28/28 pass, full suite 2976/2976 pass, git diff --check clean, and the regenerated contract has CP00-764 as latest projection with 19 valid:true and no valid:false. (4) No-write/no-real-data and read-only boundaries hold: manifest, construction-inspection, adjudication, command-evidence, and claude-review-result honestly report production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, gate_outcome passed_pending_hardened_review, pending exactly one valid hardened read-only Claude review (this receipt). Hermes packets are emits_runtime_receipt=false / writes_product_state=false, used only for deterministic review-packet/evidence handling, not product runtime. Claude is preserved as a read-only, non-final reviewer; enterprise-trust/human final approval is correctly left outside this receipt. Provenance: command and test exit codes are recorded evidence in command-evidence.json (Bash not available to this reviewer); independent source inspection corroborates them. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. This receipt verifies descriptor-level readiness only, not runtime feature readiness, which the artifacts correctly disclose (runtime_ready=false).
